notes_md:
**hành hạ** = to torture or cruelly hurt someone, physically or mentally. It’s strong — more than just “hurt” or “bother.”

Used for physical abuse, emotional abuse, or extreme suffering. It often implies repeated or intentional cruelty.


Stronger than *làm khổ* (make someone suffer). Opposite idea: *chăm sóc*, *đối xử tử tế*.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He does not want to torture anyone, even with words.
The dog was tortured before being rescued by kind people.
She feels tortured by the pressures of work every day.
exampleSentences: Anh ấy không muốn hành hạ ai dù chỉ bằng lời nói.
Con chó bị hành hạ trước khi được người tốt cứu giúp.
Chị cảm thấy bị hành hạ bởi những áp lực công việc mỗi ngày.
